message:
Add capability permission prompt overlay to TUI and RPC UI request handling

TUI capability prompt (src/interactive.rs):
- New CapabilityPromptOverlay struct with extension_id, capability,
  description, focused button index, and auto-deny timer
- render_capability_prompt() displays interactive overlay with styled
  title, extension name, capability, button row with focus highlighting,
  auto-deny countdown, and keyboard help text
- CapabilityAction enum with label(), is_allow(), is_persistent()
- handle_capability_prompt_key() for navigation and confirmation
- Updated view_effective_conversation_height() for prompt chrome
- Added ToolProgress struct tracking elapsed_ms, line_count, byte_count
- ConversationMessage now has collapsed field and constructor helpers
- format_count() utility for human-readable counts (1K, 1M, etc.)

RPC extension UI channel (src/rpc.rs):
- Set up mpsc channel (capacity 64) for ExtensionUiRequest in RPC mode
- Spawn background task to emit UI requests as JSON-RPC notifications
- Handle extension_ui_response RPC method with requestId validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
